recovery_overrides.reason: The original continuous RX SF12 batch was interrupted when COM37 and COM38 were physically disconnected after the -18 dBm point. The complete three-power SF12 batch was rerun after reconnecting the same E28 pair; all points completed successfully and the interrupted attempt remains preserved for audit.

notes: RX energy uses a deterministic integration window equal to calculated LoRa airtime.
Verified total radio loss is retained when the transmitter completed with zero serial errors.
Loss results are preserved as measured; isolated packet losses were not cherry-picked away.
